factoryName.metadata: データ ファクトリ名

Connect_population_dynamics_prefecture_p.metadata: 'Connect_population_dynamics_prefecture' の 'password' のセキュリティで保護された文字列

Connect_dbmake2026datalake_accountKey.metadata: 'Connect_dbmake2026datalake' の 'accountKey' のセキュリティで保護された文字列

properties.description: データウェアハウス（population-dynamics-prefecture）への接続
データレイク（dbmake2026datalake）への接続

scripts.text:
IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables
    WHERE name = 'population_curated'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE population_curated (
        prefecture_code        INT            NOT NULL,
        year                   INT            NOT NULL,
        population             INT            NULL,
        births                 INT            NULL,
        deaths                 INT            NULL,
        infant_deaths          INT            NULL,
        neonatal_deaths        INT            NULL,
        population_change      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_total      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_natural    INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_artificial INT            NULL,
        perinatal_deaths       INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_22weeks    INT            NULL,
        early_neonatal_deaths  INT            NULL,
        marriages              INT            NULL,
        divorces               INT            NULL,
        updated_at             DATETIME       NOT NULL 
        CONSTRAINT DF_population_curated_updated_at DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
        CONSTRAINT PK_population_curated PRIMARY KEY (prefecture_code, year)
);
END;

IF COL_LENGTH('population_curated', 'prefecture_code') IS NULL
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE population_curated
    ADD prefecture_code INT NOT NULL;
END
TRUNCATE TABLE population_landing;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1. 全角数字 → 半角数字変換テーブル
------------------------------------------------------------
DECLARE @tbl TABLE(z NCHAR(1), h NCHAR(1));
INSERT INTO @tbl(z, h)
VALUES (N'０',N'0'),(N'１',N'1'),(N'２',N'2'),(N'３',N'3'),(N'４',N'4'),
       (N'５',N'5'),(N'６',N'6'),(N'７',N'7'),(N'８',N'8'),(N'９',N'9');

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 2. prefecture_code の設定（全国=0、外=48、不詳=49）
------------------------------------------------------------
UPDATE l
SET prefecture_code =
    CASE
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'全%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 0
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'外%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 48
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'不%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 49
        ELSE TRY_CAST(
            (
                SELECT h 
                FROM @tbl 
                WHERE z = SUBSTRING(prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS, 1, 1)
            ) +
            (
                SELECT h 
                FROM @tbl 
                WHERE z = SUBSTRING(prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS, 2, 1)
            )
            AS INT
        )
    END
FROM population_landing l;

IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables
    WHERE name = 'population_landing'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE population_landing(
        prefecture_code             NVARCHAR(200),
        prefecture             NVARCHAR(200),
        year             NVARCHAR(200),
        population             NVARCHAR(200),
        births             NVARCHAR(200),
        deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        infant_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        neonatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        population_change             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_total             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_natural             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_artificial             NVARCHAR(200),
        perinatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_22weeks             NVARCHAR(200),
        early_neonatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        marriages             NVARCHAR(200),
        divorces             NVARCHAR(200),
);
END;

IF COL_LENGTH('population_landing', 'prefecture_code') IS NULL
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE population_landing
    ADD prefecture_code INT NULL;
END

IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables
    WHERE name = 'population_curated'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE population_curated (
        prefecture_code        INT            NOT NULL,
        year                   INT            NOT NULL,
        population             INT            NULL,
        births                 INT            NULL,
        deaths                 INT            NULL,
        infant_deaths          INT            NULL,
        neonatal_deaths        INT            NULL,
        population_change      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_total      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_natural    INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_artificial INT            NULL,
        perinatal_deaths       INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_22weeks    INT            NULL,
        early_neonatal_deaths  INT            NULL,
        marriages              INT            NULL,
        divorces               INT            NULL,
        updated_at             DATETIME       NOT NULL 
        CONSTRAINT DF_population_curated_updated_at DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
        CONSTRAINT PK_population_curated PRIMARY KEY (prefecture_code, year)
);
END;

IF COL_LENGTH('population_curated', 'prefecture_code') IS NULL
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE population_curated
    ADD prefecture_code INT NOT NULL;
END
TRUNCATE TABLE population_landing;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1. 全角数字 → 半角数字変換テーブル
------------------------------------------------------------

IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables
    WHERE name = 'population_curated'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE population_curated (
        prefecture_code        INT            NOT NULL,
        year                   INT            NOT NULL,
        population             INT            NULL,
        births                 INT            NULL,
        deaths                 INT            NULL,
        infant_deaths          INT            NULL,
        neonatal_deaths        INT            NULL,
        population_change      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_total      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_natural    INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_artificial INT            NULL,
        perinatal_deaths       INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_22weeks    INT            NULL,
        early_neonatal_deaths  INT            NULL,
        marriages              INT            NULL,
        divorces               INT            NULL,
        updated_at             DATETIME       NOT NULL 
        CONSTRAINT DF_population_curated_updated_at DEFAULT (GETDATE()),

END;

IF COL_LENGTH('population_curated', 'prefecture_code') IS NULL
BEGIN

    ADD prefecture_code INT NOT NULL;
END
TRUNCATE TABLE population_landing;

        prefecture_code        INT            NOT NULL,
        year                   INT            NOT NULL,
        population             INT            NULL,
        births                 INT            NULL,
        deaths                 INT            NULL,
        infant_deaths          INT            NULL,
        neonatal_deaths        INT            NULL,
        population_change      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_total      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_natural    INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_artificial INT            NULL,
        perinatal_deaths       INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_22weeks    INT            NULL,
        early_neonatal_deaths  INT            NULL,
        marriages              INT            NULL,
        divorces               INT            NULL,
        updated_at             DATETIME       NOT NULL 
        CONSTRAINT DF_population_curated_updated_at DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
        CONSTRAINT PK_population_curated PRIMARY KEY (prefecture_code, year)
);
END;

IF COL_LENGTH('population_curated', 'prefecture_code') IS NULL
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE population_curated
    ADD prefecture_code INT NOT NULL;
END
TRUNCATE TABLE population_landing;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1. 全角数字 → 半角数字変換テーブル
------------------------------------------------------------
DECLARE @tbl TABLE(z NCHAR(1), h NCHAR(1));
INSERT INTO @tbl(z, h)
VALUES (N'０',N'0'),(N'１',N'1'),(N'２',N'2'),(N'３',N'3'),(N'４',N'4'),
       (N'５',N'5'),(N'６',N'6'),(N'７',N'7'),(N'８',N'8'),(N'９',N'9');

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 2. prefecture_code の設定（全国=0、外=48、不詳=49）
------------------------------------------------------------
UPDATE l
SET prefecture_code =
    CASE
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'全%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 0
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'外%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 48
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'不%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 49
        ELSE TRY_CAST(
            (
                SELECT h 
                FROM @tbl 
                WHERE z = SUBSTRING(prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS, 1, 1)
            ) +
            (
                SELECT h 
                FROM @tbl 
                WHERE z = SUBSTRING(prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS, 2, 1)
            )
            AS INT
        )
    END
FROM population_landing l;

IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables
    WHERE name = 'population_landing'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE population_landing(
        prefecture_code             NVARCHAR(200),
        prefecture             NVARCHAR(200),
        year             NVARCHAR(200),
        population             NVARCHAR(200),
        births             NVARCHAR(200),
        deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        infant_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        neonatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        population_change             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_total             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_natural             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_artificial             NVARCHAR(200),
        perinatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_22weeks             NVARCHAR(200),
        early_neonatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        marriages             NVARCHAR(200),
        divorces             NVARCHAR(200),
);
END;

IF COL_LENGTH('population_landing', 'prefecture_code') IS NULL
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE population_landing
    ADD prefecture_code INT NULL;
END

IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables
    WHERE name = 'population_curated'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE population_curated (
        prefecture_code        INT            NOT NULL,
        year                   INT            NOT NULL,
        population             INT            NULL,
        births                 INT            NULL,
        deaths                 INT            NULL,
        infant_deaths          INT            NULL,
        neonatal_deaths        INT            NULL,
        population_change      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_total      INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_natural    INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_artificial INT            NULL,
        perinatal_deaths       INT            NULL,
        stillbirths_22weeks    INT            NULL,
        early_neonatal_deaths  INT            NULL,
        marriages              INT            NULL,
        divorces               INT            NULL,
        updated_at             DATETIME       NOT NULL 
        CONSTRAINT DF_population_curated_updated_at DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
        CONSTRAINT PK_population_curated PRIMARY KEY (prefecture_code, year)
);
END;

IF COL_LENGTH('population_curated', 'prefecture_code') IS NULL
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE population_curated
    ADD prefecture_code INT NOT NULL;
END
TRUNCATE TABLE population_landing;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1. 全角数字 → 半角数字変換テーブル
------------------------------------------------------------
DECLARE @tbl TABLE(z NCHAR(1), h NCHAR(1));
INSERT INTO @tbl(z, h)
VALUES (N'０',N'0'),(N'１',N'1'),(N'２',N'2'),(N'３',N'3'),(N'４',N'4'),
       (N'５',N'5'),(N'６',N'6'),(N'７',N'7'),(N'８',N'8'),(N'９',N'9');

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 2. prefecture_code の設定（全国=0、外=48、不詳=49）
------------------------------------------------------------
UPDATE l
SET prefecture_code =
    CASE
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'全%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 0
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'外%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 48
        WHEN prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS LIKE N'不%' COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS THEN 49
        ELSE TRY_CAST(
            (
                SELECT h 
                FROM @tbl 
                WHERE z = SUBSTRING(prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS, 1, 1)
            ) +
            (
                SELECT h 
                FROM @tbl 
                WHERE z = SUBSTRING(prefecture COLLATE Japanese_CI_AS, 2, 1)
            )
            AS INT
        )
    END
FROM population_landing l;

IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables
    WHERE name = 'population_landing'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE population_landing(
        prefecture_code             NVARCHAR(200),
        prefecture             NVARCHAR(200),
        year             NVARCHAR(200),
        population             NVARCHAR(200),
        births             NVARCHAR(200),
        deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        infant_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        neonatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        population_change             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_total             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_natural             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_artificial             NVARCHAR(200),
        perinatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        stillbirths_22weeks             NVARCHAR(200),
        early_neonatal_deaths             NVARCHAR(200),
        marriages             NVARCHAR(200),
        divorces             NVARCHAR(200),
);
